properties.description: Opens the Area Power Control lid, when set to 1. Closes it, when set to 0.
Sets the mode to the passed value. This will only be set for less than a second, before the Area Power Control will override it with it's current mode. (See Mode Values)
Locks the Area Power Control, when set to 1. Unlocks it, when set to 0.
Turns the Area Power Control on, when set to 1. Turns it off, when set to 0.
Returns whether the Area Power Control is receiving power and is turned on. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns whether the Area Power Control is flashing an error. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns the currently available power, that can be output, in Watts. (Input power plus the charge of the battery in the Area Power Control.)
Returns the maximum charge of the battery in the Area Power Control, in Watts.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. It returns the current charge percentage of the battery in the Area Power Control.
Returns the current amount of power, available to the Area Power Control input, in Watts.
Returns the current amount of power, output by the Area Power Control, in Watts.
Returns the current amount of power needed at the input, in Watts. (This includes the amount of power draw of the battery inside.)
